title: Dr. Hal Cooper Jr., Chairman, Seattle Freight Transport Advisory Board
description: Dr. Hal Cooper Jr., Chairman, Seattle Freight Transport Advisory Board; expert on the proposed Bering Strait railroad tunnel to Siberia addresses the Schiller Institute's "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought, April 13-14, 2017.

chapters.title: Connecting the Bering Strait Joining the Americas to the Belton Road Initiative in Asia
The Proposed Rail Networking in Africa
